name: Red Mara
who:
Independent thief operating outside guild control
Cunning, resourceful, fiercely independent
Named for her distinctive auburn hair
Potential rival or ally depending on player choices
Complex moral code - steals from those who can afford it
what:
Freelance thief and information broker
Rival to the Thieves Guild establishment
Potential companion if recruited
Offers alternative thief questline paths
Knows secrets about the guild's leadership
where:
Various - moves between locations based on quest progression
Initially: Dalhurst Docks (shady tavern)
Later: Player choice determines location
quests: Thieves Guild Rivalry quests, Potential recruitment as follower, Information for main questline

sprite.notes: Auburn hair, dark leather armor, confident smirk

dialogue.notes: Sarcastic, guarded, warms up if player proves trustworthy

combat.notes: Dual daggers, poison, evasion-focused fighting style

recruitment_conditions: Complete rival thief questline OR help her against guild
follower.notes: Excellent scout and infiltrator, sarcastic commentary
